Anxiety.name: Box Breathing Technique
Anxiety.description: Inhale for 4 counts, hold for 4, exhale for 4, hold for 4. Repeat 5 times. Proven to calm nervous system.

Anxiety.name: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
Anxiety.description: Systematically tense and release muscle groups. Reduces physical tension associated with anxiety.

Anxiety.name: Anxiety & Depression Association of America (ADAA)
Anxiety.description: Free resources, therapist directory, support groups for anxiety disorders.

Anxiety.name: Grounding Technique: 5-4-3-2-1
Anxiety.description: Name 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste. Brings focus to present moment.

Anxiety.name: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) Workbook
Anxiety.description: Self-help exercises to challenge anxious thoughts and build coping skills.

Depression.name: Behavioral Activation
Depression.description: Schedule small, achievable activities daily (even 10 min walk). Movement combats depression.

Depression.name: National Suicide Prevention Lifeline
Depression.description: 24/7 support. Call 988 or text HOME to 741741. Trained counselors available.

Depression.name: Journaling Prompts
Depression.description: Write 3 things you did today (however small). Helps track positive moments.

Depression.name: Depression & Bipolar Support Alliance (DBSA)
Depression.description: Peer support groups, educational resources, local chapter meetings.

Depression.name: Light Therapy
Depression.description: Exposure to bright light (10k lux) for 20-30 min in morning. Effective for seasonal depression.

Stress.name: Mindfulness Meditation (10 min daily)
Stress.description: Apps like Headspace, Calm offer guided sessions. Reduces stress hormones.

Stress.name: Time Management: Pomodoro Technique
Stress.description: Work 25 min, break 5 min. Repeat 4 times, then longer break. Prevents overwhelm.

Stress.name: American Psychological Association (APA) Stress Resources
Stress.description: Evidence-based stress reduction techniques, research, find therapist.

Stress.name: Exercise: 30 min aerobic activity
Stress.description: Walking, running, swimming. Lowers cortisol, improves mood.

Stress.name: Boundary Setting Guide
Stress.description: Learn to say no. Identify stress sources and limit exposure.

Bipolar.name: Mood Tracking Chart
Bipolar.description: Daily log of mood, sleep, energy. Identifies triggers and patterns.

Bipolar.name: Sleep Hygiene Protocol
Bipolar.description: Consistent sleep schedule crucial for bipolar stability. Aim for 7-9 hours.

Bipolar.name: Depression & Bipolar Support Alliance (DBSA)
Bipolar.description: Specialized support for bipolar disorder, medication management resources.

Bipolar.name: Professional Treatment: Medication + Therapy
Bipolar.description: Bipolar disorder typically requires professional care. Consult psychiatrist/therapist.

Bipolar.name: Crisis Planning Worksheet
Bipolar.description: Write down warning signs, coping strategies, emergency contacts in advance.

Suicidal.name: Crisis Text Line
Suicidal.description: Text HOME to 741741. Free, confidential crisis counselor support.

Suicidal.name: International Association for Suicide Prevention
Suicidal.description: Global resources, helplines, support by country.

Suicidal.name: Safety Planning Intervention
Suicidal.description: Work with therapist to identify warning signs, coping strategies, support people, professional contacts.

Suicidal.name: Emergency Services
Suicidal.description: If immediate danger: Call 911 (US) or go to nearest emergency room.

Personality disorder.name: Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) Skills
Personality disorder.description: Mindfulness, distress tolerance, emotional regulation, interpersonal effectiveness modules.

Personality disorder.name: Therapy: DBT or Schema Therapy
Personality disorder.description: Personality disorders benefit from specialized therapy. Seek trained therapist.

Personality disorder.name: Self-Compassion Practices
Personality disorder.description: Treat yourself with kindness during difficult moments. Reduces shame-based reactions.

Personality disorder.name: NAMI (National Alliance on Mental Illness)
Personality disorder.description: Resources for personality disorders, find support groups, educational programs.

Personality disorder.name: Interpersonal Effectiveness Worksheet
Personality disorder.description: Practice communication skills in safe environment. Build healthier relationships.

Normal.name: Mental Health Maintenance: Regular Exercise
Normal.description: 3-5 times/week, 30 min. Sustains mood, resilience, cognitive function.

Normal.name: Social Connection
Normal.description: Regular contact with friends/family. Protective factor for mental health.

Normal.name: Annual Mental Health Check-In
Normal.description: Even if feeling well, annual therapy session can prevent burnout and build resilience.

Normal.name: Sleep & Nutrition Foundation
Normal.description: 7-9 hours sleep, balanced diet with omega-3s. Foundation for mental wellbeing.

Normal.name: Stress Prevention: Hobbies & Leisure
Normal.description: Regular activities you enjoy. Builds resilience and prevents burnout.
